name: Oktopost
description:
Catering to B2B companies, Oktopost provides tools for social media publishing, employee advocacy, social listening, and social media analytics. The platform is designed to help marketers manage, monitor, and measure all of their social media activities, making it a powerful home base for businesses of all sizes.

Key Features

  • Publishing capabilities let users schedule and publish content across multiple platforms and profiles from a single dashboard.
  • Employee advocacy tools boost users’ reach and engagement, encouraging employees to share curated content across their personal social networks.
  • Social listening tools monitor social conversations and track brand mentions so users can engage with their audience in real-time.
  • Analytics and reporting features measure ROI and help track users’ campaign performance, helping businesses tie social activities to business outcomes.

Usability

Oktopost is designed with a focus on the needs of B2B marketers, offering a user-friendly interface that simplifies complex social media marketing tasks. Its dashboard and reporting tools are intuitive, making it easier for marketing teams to collaborate, plan, and execute their social media strategies effectively.

Platform Compatibility

  • LinkedIn 
  • X (Twitter)
  • Facebook
  • Instagram

Oktopost Pricing

Oktopost offers custom plans based on the specific needs and scale of each business. 

Customer Support

Oktopost’s account managers and support team provide assistance through email. The customer team is supported by a plethora of resources, including a knowledge base, webinars, eBooks, and a blog with valuable social media marketing insights.

Power Users

  • B2B marketers looking to streamline their social media management.
  • Companies that want to amplify their content reach and engagement via employee advocacy programs.
  • Marketing teams that need robust analytics to demonstrate the ROI of their social media efforts and its impact on lead generation and sales.

Oktopost’s Additional Features

  • Integration with marketing automation and CRM make Oktopost a valuable option for teams that utilize platforms like Marketo, HubSpot, and Salesforce, allowing for the seamless flow of social media lead data into sales pipelines.
  • Content curation tools help users discover and share content that resonates with their professional audiences to cultivate thought leadership.
  • Social campaign planning tools let users create and manage targeted social media campaigns, complete with tagging and tracking capabilities to analyze their success.

Oktopost stands out for its comprehensive suite of features tailored to the specific needs of B2B marketers, offering an incredible platform for managing sophisticated social media strategies that drive measurable business results.

‍
